text:
The is a technology specifically developed to fight against the Armored Titan. Other articles with this name include:
Thunder Spear (Anime) - Anime version of the aforementioned object.
The Thunder Spears - The 76th chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
Thunder Spears (Episode) - The 51st episode of the Attack on Titan anime.

es:Lanza Relámpago (Desambiguación)
